# Connect IMDb

Connect once so ratings made here can also reach IMDb.

> Security: Use disposable test accounts and non-personal sample data. Cover cookies, API keys, emails, names, and identifiers with solid opaque blocks before saving. Never blur a secret and never place an unredacted source image in the repository. Inspect the final image at full resolution and remove metadata before adding it.

## 1. Sign in to IMDb

Open IMDb and sign in with the account that should receive your ratings.

[Open IMDb](https://www.imdb.com/)

> **Screenshot needed:** IMDb home page in desktop Chrome showing a disposable test account signed in.
>
> **Solid-redact:** Account name, Account avatar, Personal recommendations

Last verified: Pending screenshot capture.

## 2. Open Network tools

Press F12, choose Network, then refresh IMDb so the request list fills in.

> **Screenshot needed:** IMDb in desktop Chrome with DevTools docked and the Network tab selected after a refresh.
>
> **Solid-redact:** Account name, Personal page content

Last verified: Pending screenshot capture.

## 3. Choose the IMDb request

Select the main www.imdb.com document request, then open its Headers panel.

> **Screenshot needed:** Chrome Network request list with the main www.imdb.com document row selected and Headers visible.
>
> **Solid-redact:** Request identifiers containing account data, Account name

Last verified: Pending screenshot capture.

## 4. Copy the Cookie value

Under Request Headers, copy the complete value beside Cookie. Treat it like a temporary password.

> **Screenshot needed:** Request Headers section with the Cookie row highlighted and its value covered by a solid redaction.
>
> **Solid-redact:** Complete Cookie header value, Account email or name, Account identifiers

Last verified: Pending screenshot capture.

## 5. Save the connection

Paste the value into Rapid Rater and choose Connect IMDb. The saved value is encrypted and never shown again.

In Rapid Rater: **Open IMDb connection**

> **Screenshot needed:** Rapid Rater IMDb connection form with a safe fake value or a fully covered cookie field.
>
> **Solid-redact:** Cookie field, Signed-in email

Last verified: Pending screenshot capture.
